kilauea_notices.title: HAWAIIAN VOLCANO OBSERVATORY DAILY UPDATE
kilauea_notices.message: HVO Kilauea YELLOW/ADVISORY - Kīlauea volcano is not erupting; the summit eruption in Halemaʻumaʻu is paused. Episode 48 occurred on June 1. Forecast models based on summit inflation rates indicate that episode 49 of lava fountaining is likely to occur between June 12 and 15.

mauna_loa_notices.title: HAWAIIAN VOLCANO OBSERVATORY MONTHLY UPDATE
mauna_loa_notices.message: HVO Haleakala GREEN/NORMAL - No activity of concern for Haleakalā.
